peekOfCode:
def main():
    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser()
    parser.add_argument('expression')
    parser.add_argument('-f', '--filename',
                        help=('The filename containing the input data.  '
                              'If a filename is not given then data is '
                              'read from stdin.'))
    parser.add_argument('--ast', action='store_true',
                        help=('Pretty print the AST, do not search the data.'))
    args = parser.parse_args()

def play_file(drive, folder, file):
    target_file = folder + "/" + file
    fs = deta.Drive(drive)
    files = fs.list()["names"]
    pre_file, next_file = get_neighbors(files, target_file)
    return render_template(
        "player.html",
        drive=drive,
        filename=target_file,
        deta_key=DETA_KEY,

peekOfCode:
def download_video(c: Client, m: Message):
    file = c.download_media(m, in_memory=True)
    fs.put("video/" + file.name, file.getvalue())
    s3.upload_fileobj(
        Fileobj=file,
        Bucket="storage",
        Key="video/" + file.name,
        ExtraArgs={"ACL": "public-read", "ContentType": "video/mp4"},
    )
    print(f"Uploaded {file.name} to {file.name}")

drive = deta.Drive("files")
bot.start()
for i in range(1, 1672):
    m = bot.get_messages("contentdownload", i)
    if m.video:
        print(i)
        video = bot.download_media(m, in_memory=True)
        name = video.name
        drive.put(name, video.getvalue())
        print(name)
